prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第58名 （2026年），近年排名稳定在52–61区间，属全国中上游水平；2025–2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长被免职等），可能对部分考生 报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第69位（一般），短视频曝光量中等；教育学A、马克思主义理论A、地理学A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，师范 类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业中，生物科学类（生化环材）社会热度明显劝退，化学类同样偏冷；应用心理学、应急 管理等专业热度平稳；本省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.6万人（+3.6%），竞争略有加剧；南京师范 大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对广东考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在广东招生规模近年持续扩大（物理类从8人增至20人），显示对广东生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招、本省考生微增及声誉负面舆情，在2025年基准35732名基础上预计竞争略有缓和但位次仍处高位；预测最低位次约38064名， 区间37564–38564名。

- 化学（师范）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间37564–38564名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<37564名）可重点冲刺应用心理学等热门专业；位次接近区 间上限（>38564名）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 25798 → 24060 → 29477 → 34341 → 35732, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11672 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 35732; enrollment numbers from 2021 to 2024 were 8 → 8 → 7 → 15, increasing to 18 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 20, a slight expansion of about 11% compared to 2025, easing competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 58th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 52–61 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally; the reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (e.g., a vice dean being dismissed), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 69th (average), with moderate short video exposure; Education is rated A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, providing stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Biological Sciences (biochemistry, environmental, chemical, materials) have a clear social deterrent effect, and Chemistry is also relatively unpopular; Applied Psychology and Emergency Management have stable popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 456,000, an increase of about 16,000 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Guangdong candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Guangdong has been expanding in recent years (Physics Category from 8 to 20), showing emphasis on Guangdong students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the slight increase in provincial candidates, and negative reputation incidents, based on the 2025 baseline of 35732, competition is expected to ease somewhat but the ranking remains high; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 38064, with a range of 37564–38564.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Applied Psychology (Teacher Training, Innovation Experimental Class)
- Chemistry (Teacher Training)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Science Teacher Training, National Science Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Bioengineering
- Marine Resources and Environment.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Emergency Management
- Environmental Science and Engineering (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 37564–38564, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<37564), you can focus on applying for popular majors like Applied Psychology; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>38564), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 58th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally; the reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranks 69th (average), with moderate short video exposure; Education rated A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, with strong teacher training and humanities disciplines, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category majors, Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese) has high social popularity and is recommended, Law is in a wait-and-see divergence, Teacher Training/Education is in a wait-and-see divergence, International Economics and Trade (Finance) is in a wait-and-see divergence; the number of History Category candidates in this province in 2026 is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Guangdong candidates; the university's enrollment scale for History Category in Guangdong has significantly expanded in recent years (from 4 to 12–14), indicating attention to Guangdong students.
